subject: feat(pwa): cache headers, security headers, toast queue, install UX
body:
Apply PWA improvements from glow-props shared standards:

vercel.json:
- Cache-Control: immutable for /assets/ and /_expo/static/ (hashed files)
- Cache-Control: no-cache for everything else (index.html, sw.js)
- Security headers: X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY,
  Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin

Toast.tsx:
- Queue support: stack up to 3 toasts (was single-replace)
- Extract ToastItem: each toast has own animation + auto-dismiss timer
- Add 'warning' type with PRICE_COLORS.aging (yellow-600) background
- showToast() API unchanged — all existing callers unaffected

InstallInstructionsModal.tsx:
- Add 'note' field to instruction data (Firefox desktop, unknown browser)
- Render warning-styled note row with info-circle icon
- Add benefits section: offline, home screen, full-screen (helps
  non-technical users understand WHY to install)

usePWAUpdate.ts:
- Verified: interval is properly cleaned up via intervalRef + useEffect
  cleanup. The glow-props warning about onRegistered leak doesn't apply
  (this hook doesn't use the onRegistered callback pattern).

Tags: pwa, security, toast, install, vercel
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: minor
